subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Jinab-i-Aqa Mirza Hasan hath arrived and opened his tongue in praise of you, expressing gratitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی جناب آقا میرزا حسن وارد و زبان بستایش شما گشود و اظهار ممنونی
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @compassion; kindness, @importance of community building, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @love and unity
